name: Mission Forward
tagline: Translate your service into a clear identity, mission, and plan for civilian life.
coachInstructions: This is the military-to-civilian transition track. Use secular, mission-oriented language. Translate military strengths (leadership, discipline, teamwork, mission focus) into civilian value. Address common transition challenges: identity shift, translating skills, finding new purpose. Avoid religious language unless the coachee introduces it.

resources.title: DOD Transition Assistance Program (TAP)
resources.description: Benefits, education, and employment support for your transition.

resources.title: Military OneSource
resources.description: Free confidential support for service members and families.

resources.title: PsychArmor (free courses)
resources.description: Resilience and transition courses for the military community.

resources.title: O*NET Military Crosswalk
resources.description: Translate your MOS/rating into civilian occupations.

resources.title: VIA Character Strengths (free)
resources.description: Name the strengths you bring beyond the uniform.

resources.title: Start With Why — Simon Sinek
resources.description: Reconnect with your deeper 'why' for the next mission.

resources.title: DOD SkillBridge
resources.description: Civilian on-the-job training during your last 180 days of service.

resources.title: My Next Move for Veterans
resources.description: Find civilian careers that match your military experience.

resources.title: SMART Goals (MindTools)
resources.description: Turn your vision into a clear, measurable plan.

resources.title: VA Education Benefits / GI Bill
resources.description: Education and training benefits you've earned.

resources.title: TTI TriMetrix HD
resources.description: Your primary assessment — behaviors, driving forces, and acumen/mindset.
